info.title: xstyler
info.description:
Copyright © Xavalon 2024
-f, --file                           XAML file to process (supports
comma-separated list).
-d, --directory                      Directory to process XAML files in.
-c, --config                         JSON file containing XAML Styler settings
configuration.
-i, --ignore                         (Default: false) Ignore XAML file type
check and process all files.
-r, --recursive                      (Default: false) Recursively process
specified directory.
-p, --passive                        (Default: false) Check files follow
proper formatting without making any
modifications. Returns error status if
files fail the check.
--write-to-stdout                    (Default: false) Instead of modifying the
file, write to stdout. In this mode, logs
are printed to stderr. Must specify
exactly one file. Cannot be compbined
with --passive.
-l, --loglevel                       (Default: Default) Levels in order of
increasing detail: None, Minimal,
Default, Verbose, Debug
--indent-size                        Override: indent size.
--indent-tabs                        Override: indent with tabs.
--attributes-tolerance               Override: attributes tolerance.
--attributes-same-line               Override: keep first attribute on the
same line.
--attributes-max-chars               Override: max attribute characters per
line.
--attributes-max                     Override: max attributes per line.
--no-newline-elements                Override: no newline elements.
--attributes-order-groups-newline    Override: put attribute order rule groups
on separate lines.
--attributes-indentation             Override: attribute indentation.
--attributes-indentation-style       Override: attribute indentation style.
--remove-design-references           Override: remove design time references.
--attributes-reorder                 Override: enable attribute reordering.
--attributes-first-line              Override: first line attributes.
--attributes-order-name              Override: order attributes by name.
--ending-bracket-newline             Override: put ending bracket on new line.
--remove-empty-ending-tag            Override: remove ending tag of empty
element.
--space-before-closing-slash         Override: space before closing slash.
--root-line-break                    Override: root element line break rule.
--reorder-vsm                        Override: reorder visual state manager
rule.
--reorder-grid-children              Override: reorder grid children.
--reorder-canvas-children            Override: reorder canvas children.
--reorder-setters                    Override: reorder setters.
--format-markup-extension            Override: format markup extension.
--no-newline-markup-extensions       Override: no newline markup extensions.
--thickness-style                    Override: thickness style.
--thickness-attributes               Override: thickness attributes.
--comment-spaces                     Override: comment spaces.
--help                               Display this help screen.
--version                            Display version information.
